---
title: "Guides & Documentation"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Browse technical guides and documentation on security, cloud architecture, and API development from chen.ist's expert team."
listing:
  contents:
    - "security/*.qmd"
    - "cloud/*.qmd"
    - "api/*.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, reading-time]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Technical <span class="gr">Guides</span></h1>
    <p>Comprehensive documentation and how-to guides for security, cloud, and API development.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by Category</h2>
    <p class="sub">Deep-dive guides written by practitioners, not marketers.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security Guides</h3><p>Best practices, implementation guides, and security frameworks.</p><a href="security/" class="m-lk">Browse Security Guides</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud Guides</h3><p>Cloud migration, optimization, and management resources.</p><a href="cloud/" class="m-lk">Browse Cloud Guides</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>API Documentation</h3><p>API reference, integration guides, and developer resources.</p><a href="api/" class="m-lk">Browse API Docs</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Featured Guides</h2>
    <p class="sub">Our most popular and comprehensive resources.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i><h3>Security Implementation Guide</h3><p>A comprehensive guide to implementing robust security practices in your organization, covering everything from risk assessment to incident response.</p><span class="m-tag">Security</span> <span class="m-tag">25 min read</span><br><a href="security/implementation-guide.html" class="m-lk">Read Guide</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up"></i><h3>Cloud Migration Handbook</h3><p>A step-by-step guide to migrating your applications and infrastructure to the cloud, with strategies for minimizing downtime and optimizing costs.</p><span class="m-tag">Cloud</span> <span class="m-tag">30 min read</span><br><a href="cloud/migration-handbook.html" class="m-lk">Read Guide</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>All Guides</h2>
    <p class="sub">Browse our complete collection of technical guides.</p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

## All Guides

Browse our complete collection of technical guides:
